text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, there are two kinds of people in
this world.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Those who know when to swallow dried squid...
and those who don't.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: If I'm being honest, I am the latter... No matter how much I chew, it just never feels right.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, a sympathetic face, I see.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then let us undertake this journey together... A
journey to jaws strong enough to bite through
even the Kraken itself!
